Design system paints colors but defines no forced-colors / high-contrast handling — in Windows High Contrast Mode (forced-colors) components may lose borders, focus rings, and meaning conveyed by color
findings.suggestion: add a `@media (forced-colors: active)` block (use `forced-color-adjust` and system color keywords for borders/focus), or a `prefers-contrast` / high-contrast token set

findings.message: Design system uses transitions/animations but defines no `prefers-reduced-motion` guard — users who request reduced motion still get the full animations
findings.suggestion: add a `@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)` block that disables or shortens motion (or gate motion behind `prefers-reduced-motion: no-preference`)

findings.message: No agent instruction files found (neither `.cursor/rules/*.mdc` nor `.claude/skills/*/SKILL.md`)
findings.suggestion: add at least one Cursor rule under `.cursor/rules/` or one Claude skill under `.claude/skills/<name>/SKILL.md` so coding agents have project-specific guidance

findings.message: No MCP config file found — design system is not declared as AI-agent-accessible
findings.suggestion: create `.mcp.json` (Claude Code), `.cursor/mcp.json` (Cursor), or `claude_desktop_config.json` declaring at least one MCP server with a `command`

findings.message: AGENTS.md does not mention any toolchain config file present in the repo (package.json, tsconfig.json, ...)
findings.suggestion: reference the project's actual config files so agents know which toolchain is in scope

findings.message: No structured CHANGELOG found — AI agents (and humans) can't see what changed between versions
findings.suggestion: add a CHANGELOG.md with version-structured entries (Keep a Changelog: `## [1.2.0]` headings) so consumers and AI agents can track changes and breaking updates

findings.message: No migration/upgrade guide found — AI agents (and humans) upgrading across versions have no documented path for breaking changes
findings.suggestion: add a MIGRATION.md / UPGRADING.md (or a `## Migration` section in the CHANGELOG) describing how to move across breaking versions

findings.message: No llms.txt at repo root — AI agents have no top-level map of the design system
findings.suggestion: add an llms.txt file (llmstxt.org spec) with an H1 title, a blockquote summary, and `## <section>` link lists

findings.message: Hardcoded `linear-gradient()` — gradients should come from a token, not inline literals

findings.message: No component manifest JSON found — MCP tools fall back to source-file reads
findings.suggestion: create a `components.json` or `lyse.components.json` listing your components ({ name, sourceFile }) so MCP servers can serve component lookups at ~5× lower cost than reading source files

findings.message: Exported component <Badge> has no doc comment — IDE tooltips and AI agents get no usage guidance
findings.suggestion: add a JSDoc block (/** … */) above Badge describing what it is and when to use it
